urdu transliteration text:
Akbar tumhe maloom hai kya maang rahe ho
Tum baap se marne ki reza maang rahe ho
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Akbar, do you realize what you’re asking for? You are asking your father’s permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Is alame ghurbat mein tumhe jane doon kaise
Is dashte musibat mein tumhe jane doon kaise
Is waqte qayamat me tumhe jane doon kaise
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: In this state of loss, how do I let you go?In this land of calamities, how do I let you go?In this time of tragedy, how do I let you go?

urdu transliteration text:
Ay laal jo tum izn wigaa maang rahe ho,
Tum baap se marne ki reza maang rahe ho
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh my beloved child, are you really asking me for permission to let you become a martyr?You are asking your father for permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Kya guzregi is baap ke dil par nahin socha Tumne ye meri jaan ali akbar nahin socha Mar jaunga me tujhse bichhad kar nahi socha
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Before you asked, did you not consider what will happen to your father’s heart? Oh my beloved son did you not think of this? That I will pass away if I am separated from you?

urdu transliteration text:
Tum mujhse zaeefi ka asaa maang rahe ho
Tum baap se marne ki reza maang rahe ho
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You are asking me to separate myself from my old age support/walking caneYou are asking your father for permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Ek roz tujhe aake manga tha phuphi ne, Atthara baras naazon se paala tha phuphi ne Beto se bhi zyada tumhe chaha tha phuphi ne
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: One day your aunt came and asked for yo For 18 years your aunt has lovingly raised you She nurtured you more than her own sons

urdu transliteration text:
Ehsaan jo zainab ne kiya maang rahe ho
Tum baap se marne ki reza maang rahe ho
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: You are asking for the sacrifices that Zaynab (a) has made for you to be nullified You are asking your father for permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Sar tera bhi jis waqt chadhega sare naiza, Hoga sare maidaan juda sar bhi tumhara, Hum shakle payambar ka gala kaatenge aadaa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When your head will be raised on a spear Your head too, will be cut in the battlefield The neck of the one who resembles the Prophet (s) will be cut by the enemies

urdu transliteration text:
Goya mere nana ka gala maang rahe ho
Tum baap se marne ki reza maang rahe ho
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: It’s as if you are asking me to sacrifice the neck of my GrandfatherYou are asking your father for permission to let you become a martyr!

urdu transliteration text:
Baba mujh maloom hai kya maang raha hoon
Ek baap se marne ki riza maang raha hoon
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Ali Akbar addresses his father: "Oh my Father, I know what I am asking for” I am asking for permission to be martyred from a father!

urdu transliteration text:
Baba mujhe Amma ne bhi kuch dars diya hai, Adabe wafa se mujh aagah kiya hai, Pehle mein maru aap se wada ye liya hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh Father, Mother has taught me a few lessons She has taught me about the etiquettes of loyalty She made me promise that I will be martyred before you

urdu transliteration text:
Bus is liye marne ki riza maang raha hoon
Ek baap se marne ki riza maang raha hoon
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: For this reason, I am asking for your permission to become a martyr I am asking for permission from a father to le this son be martyred!

urdu transliteration text:
Baba mujhe ehwaal e dilzaar pata hai, Hai sakht bohat manzile dushwaar pata hai, Aur deen ka mushkil mein hai sardaar pata hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Oh Father, I am aware of the condition of your broken heart I recognize that my killing will be extremely harsh on you. I recognize that that you are facing tremendous difficulty

urdu transliteration text:
Yun aap se marne ki riza mangu raha hoon
Ek baap se marne ki riza maang raha hoon
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: And now here I am, asking for your permission to become a martyr I am asking for permission from a father to let his son be martyred!
